summary: PR Sync Fix testing: Backend all pass (9/9). Critical frontend bug found and fixed — prBoardLifts useMemo was declared AFTER estMaxCards which referenced it (TDZ error), causing Track screen to crash. Fixed by reordering declarations. All features now verified working.

react_native_issues.issue: FIXED: ReferenceError: Cannot access 'prBoardLifts' before initialization — estMaxCards was declared before prBoardLifts in the file, causing a temporal dead zone crash on every render of the Track tab. Fixed by moving prBoardLifts useMemo before estMaxCards.

critical_code_review_comments: useMemo declarations that reference other useMemo constants must appear AFTER their dependencies — const declarations are not hoisted and create TDZ errors if used before initialization.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Migration ran and is idempotent. GET /api/lifts returns {lifts: [...]} (dict, not list). Track page was crashing due to prBoardLifts TDZ error — FIXED. PR board shows real e1rm values. Overview shows SQUAT: 262 (Back Squat). Achievements shows 3 badges with PR Hunter earned.
rca_of_issue: Root Cause: In track.tsx, estMaxCards useMemo (line ~393) referenced prBoardLifts but prBoardLifts useMemo was declared later (line ~423). JavaScript const has no hoisting — accessing a const before its declaration throws ReferenceError (TDZ). Fix: moved prBoardLifts useMemo block before estMaxCards useMemo. Migration note: startup log confirms '[MIGRATION] No exercise name migrations needed — all names are canonical' (idempotent after first run).
